qa_pairs.question: How can users be invited to join a Globus group?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can be invited to a Globus group by entering their email address (which is the preferred method) or by searching for their username. Once users are selected, clicking the 'Add' button will send them an email invitation to join. They will become visible in the group once they accept the invitation.

qa_pairs.question: What are the different membership roles available for users in a Globus group, and what permissions do they grant?
qa_pairs.answer: Within a Globus group, users can be assigned one of three roles: Admin, Manager, or Member. An Admin has full access, a Manager is able to change user roles, and a Member has no management functions. Any changes to these roles are committed by clicking the 'Save Changes' button.
